label: Transparent frog motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a tree frog motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A bright tree frog with leaf green skin, cream belly, amber eyes, subtle wet highlights, accurate amphibian anatomy, delicate toes, and crisp natural edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the legs, toes, eyes, or body silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves rain-pond color and moist skin detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Frog" derived from the visible transparent tree frog cutout shown earlier.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable labels.
Reference use: Use the visible frog motif as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from leaf green skin, cream belly, amber eyes, wet highlights, delicate toe pads, and rain pond context.
Required visible sections: Morphous Frog, Tree Frog, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Collaboration Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; labels: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line charts, bar charts, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture samples, simple icon treatment.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style lightweight collaboration system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, lily-pad grouping, wet leaf texture, quick task clarity, airy panels.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: leaf green, cream, amber eye, rain blue, moss green, stem olive, pond shadow, lily cream.
Composition: light pond-cream background, modular panels, small motif preview, clear design token swatches, wide collaboration dashboard preview across the center, compact component groups along the edges.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Frog", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a DARK MODE version of the visible Morphous Frog design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable labels.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent tree frog cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Frog board as references. Preserve palette roles, lily-pad grouping, wet texture, component language, spacing, Japanese typography, shadcn/tweakcn component coverage, and collaboration dashboard structure.
Required visible sections: Morphous Frog, Tree Frog, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Collaboration Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from wet leaf ink and pond shadow, readable text from pond cream, primary accents from leaf green and moss, focus accents from amber eye, cool support from rain blue, subtle wet skin and lily texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: dark buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command search, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line charts, bar charts, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture samples, and simple icon treatment.
Composition: one comprehensive dark board, modular panels, small motif preview, clear design token swatches, wide collaboration dashboard preview across the center, compact component groups along the edges.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible microtext, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Frog".
